category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Argentina) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Argentina Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入阿根廷：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入阿根廷：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Argentine requirements: Secretaria de Comercio mandatory electrical-safety certification and the S-safety mark, IRAM/IEC 62133 cell safety, ENACOM wireless type approval, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer (CUIT) obligation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与阿根廷要求对照：贸易秘书处强制电气安全认证及S安全标志、IRAM/IEC 62133电芯安全、ENACOM无线型号核准、UN 38.3运输，以及在地进口商（CUIT）义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與阿根廷要求對照：貿易秘書處強制電氣安全認證及S安全標誌、IRAM/IEC 62133電芯安全、ENACOM無線型號核准、UN 38.3運輸，以及在地進口商（CUIT）義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Argentina must obtain Secretaria de Comercio mandatory electrical-safety certification with the S-mark (via IRAM or a recognized certifier) where in scope, IRAM/IEC 62133 cell safety testing, ENACOM type approval for any wireless functions, a UN 38.3 transport report, and an in-country importer holding a CUIT — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口阿根廷，须在适用范围内取得贸易秘书处强制电气安全认证及S标志（经IRAM或认可认证机构）、IRAM/IEC 62133电芯安全检测、任何无线功能的ENACOM型号核准、UN 38.3运输报告，并由持有CUIT的在地进口商承担义务——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口阿根廷，須在適用範圍內取得貿易秘書處強制電氣安全認證及S標誌（經IRAM或認可認證機構）、IRAM/IEC 62133電芯安全檢測、任何無線功能的ENACOM型號核准、UN 38.3運輸報告，並由持有CUIT的在地進口商承擔義務——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred (argentina.gob.ar, iram.org.ar, enacom.gob.ar, unece.org, iec.ch).
